notes: Author-curated public skill snapshot for common adult immunization questions. This is not a complete clinical forecasting engine and should be verified against the live CDC schedule for edge cases, risk-based indications, and shared decision-making scenarios.

logic.context_prompt: current COVID recommendations depend on the current season, age, prior doses, and risk context; review current CDC season guidance before treating this as a hard gap

schedule.notes: Use a nuanced, season-aware review instead of a hard annual gap.
Simplified adult booster rule after documented primary history.
Evidence of immunity may also come from labs or prior documentation. Risk-based contexts can change the recommendation.
Evidence of immunity may also come from prior disease history or labs.

schedule.ages: Adults with age- and risk-based recommendation differences
schedule.notes: Treat a documented 3-dose series or supportive immunity titer as likely current in the simplified public skill.
Simplified age-at-first-dose rule for public skill use.

logic.context_prompt: meningococcal ACWY recommendations depend on travel, college, military, or other risk context when adolescent completion is not already documented

schedule.notes: Credit a simplified adolescent completion pattern when clearly documented.

logic.context_prompt: MenB is not routinely indicated for every adult; when risk context is absent, treat this as context-dependent rather than a hard gap

schedule.notes: Use a context-dependent read rather than a blanket due/not-due classification.

logic.context_prompt: Hepatitis A is often travel- or exposure-driven in adults; ask about travel, risk, or prior documentation before treating it as a gap

schedule.notes: Include for broader public coverage but keep it context-dependent.

logic.context_prompt: adult IPV booster decisions are usually travel- or exposure-dependent; ask for that context before labeling a gap

schedule.notes: Most adult IPV questions are travel-context questions.

schedule.ages: Age 50 and older or risk-based younger adults

logic.context_prompt: pneumococcal recommendations depend on age and risk profile; ask about those factors before treating this as a hard gap

schedule.notes: Age-gated adult antigen for broader public users.

logic.context_prompt: zoster recommendations are age-gated and product-specific; ask whether the patient has documented zoster vaccination history before labeling a gap

schedule.notes: Included as an age-gated adult antigen even though the current CVX map does not yet cover shingles products.

schedule.ages: Age 50 and older or older-adult shared decision-making contexts

logic.context_prompt: RSV recommendations depend on age band and current season guidance; ask for age and current clinician guidance context before labeling a gap

schedule.notes: Included as an age-gated adult antigen for broader public users.
